nasb.text: For I, the Lord, love justice, I hate robbery in the burnt offering; And I will faithfully give them their recompense And make an everlasting covenant with them.

esv.text: For I the Lord love justice; I hate robbery and wrong; I will faithfully give them their recompense, and I will make an everlasting covenant with them.

cnv.text: 因為我耶和華喜愛公平， 恨惡不義的搶奪； 我要憑真理賞賜他們， 與他們立永遠的約。

ccb.text: “因为我耶和华喜爱公正， 憎恶抢劫之罪。 我必凭信实赏赐我的子民， 与他们立永远的约。

csbs.text: 因为我耶和华喜爱公正， 恨恶抢夺和不义； 我必凭着信实给他们酬报， 与他们立永远的约。
